description_long: This object is a rectangular terracotta planter filled with several stylized purple flowers and dense green grass-like foliage. The planter has a slightly flared rim and a matte, earthy brown finish with subtle surface speckles. The flowers each have six broad, flat petals with a mottled purple texture and a circular yellow center, arranged above the grass. The petals are radially arranged and slightly angled, giving a dynamic, lively appearance. The green leaves are narrow and linear, resembling blades of grass, densely packed around the flower stems. This decorative planter would commonly be found on urban sidewalks, balconies, or in public parks as an ornamental feature.
description: A rectangular terracotta planter holds several stylized purple flowers with yellow centers and dense green grass-like foliage. The flowers have six broad petals each, arranged above the foliage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the planter with three prominent purple flowers facing forward, revealing the yellow centers and dense green foliage.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the rectangular shape of the planter and the spread of flowers and foliage across its width.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displays the back petals of the flowers and the depth of the planter, with foliage partially obscuring some flowers.
description_view_3: Back view shows the flowers mostly from behind, with petals angled away and dense green foliage dominating the view.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, with each flower displaying six evenly spaced, broad petals radiating symmetrically from a central yellow disk. The petals do not overlap and are flat, creating a star-like appearance.
